rules.name: Bottom Line Up Front
rules.principle: State the conclusion first, then the evidence. Never make people wait for the point.
rules.insight_template: What is the single sentence answer to {question} before you explain anything?

rules.name: Audience Calibration
rules.principle: Every message has one primary recipient. Optimize for them, not the room.
rules.insight_template: Who is the one person whose understanding matters most in {situation}? What do they need to hear?

rules.name: Silence as Signal
rules.principle: Uncomfortable silence is information. Resist filling it prematurely.
rules.insight_template: In your last difficult conversation about {topic}, what did the silences tell you?

rules.name: Precision Over Volume
rules.principle: One precise sentence outperforms three vague paragraphs every time.
rules.insight_template: Can you reduce your message about {topic} to a single precise sentence without losing meaning?

rules.name: Emotional Labeling
rules.principle: Name the emotion in the room before addressing the content. It clears the channel.
rules.insight_template: What emotion is present but unspoken in your current situation with {person}?

rules.name: Question Quality
rules.principle: The quality of your questions determines the quality of your intelligence.
rules.insight_template: What is the one question about {situation} you have been afraid to ask directly?

rules.name: Written Clarity Test
rules.principle: If you cannot write it clearly, you do not understand it clearly.
rules.insight_template: Write the core of your {argument} in three sentences. What gets cut?

rules.name: Mirroring
rules.principle: Repeat the last 3 words of what someone said as a question. It unlocks depth.
rules.insight_template: What has {person} said repeatedly that you have not reflected back to them yet?

rules.name: Frame Control
rules.principle: Whoever sets the frame controls the conversation. Set it deliberately.
rules.insight_template: What frame is currently operating in your negotiation about {topic}? Is it yours or theirs?

rules.name: Feedback Specificity
rules.principle: Vague feedback is noise. Specific behavioral feedback is signal.
rules.insight_template: What specific behavior — not trait — do you need to address with {person}?
